mainEntity.name: What is the cost of company strike-off in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fees depend on compliance backlog (number of overdue filings), outstanding liabilities, and complexity of NOC procurement. Our fee covers complete closure — compliance catch-up, STK-2 filing, and follow-up. Contact +91-77000 89597 for assessment.

mainEntity.name: Can a company with pending tax dues be struck off?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. All tax liabilities (income tax, GST, TDS) must be cleared before STK-2 filing. We handle the complete tax closure — filing final returns, paying outstanding dues, and obtaining NOCs from tax authorities.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between strike-off and winding up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Strike-off (Section 248) is simpler and cheaper — suitable for companies with no liabilities. Winding up (Section 361) involves NCLT proceedings and is required when the company has creditors or complex liabilities. We advise on the appropriate route.
